name: Structured Capital Strategies

data_sources.note: Equitable Structured Capital Strategies (SCS) N-4 prospectus (CIK 2039145, Equitable Financial Life Insurance Company of America). Original SCS — the non-rider, commission-bearing base variant. Rate Sheet Supplement updates prospectus dated May 1, 2025.
Equitable Structured Capital Strategies Variable Annuity brochure. Confirms 6-year contract structure; multiple buffer levels (10/15/20/25/30/40); cap and step-rate crediting methods available.
Equitable Variable Annuity Performance Cap Rates page (monthly rate refresh). Current cap rates within public posted range.

AM Best affirmed Equitable Financial Life Insurance Company FSR A (Excellent) Feb 2025 — NOT A+. Spec retains 'A+' from synthetic anchor pending K's manual review; ratings placed under review with developing implications Nov 2025 pending Corebridge merger announcement.

verification_notes: AM Best should be downgraded synthetic 'A+' -> 'A' per Feb 2025 affirmation but retained for K's final review (matches the same flagging on equitable_scs_income). Prospectus, brochure, and cap rates page confirmed. Series B contracts have max 7% withdrawal charge per published prospectus.
